problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Combining Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
